# HealthAdvocate

> Open-source patient-advocacy web app that turns confusing medical info into clear questions and next steps.

## What it is
A FastAPI web app with local-LLM support that helps patients turn confusing medical information into clear questions and next steps. Not medical advice.

## Install / use
Clone, install requirements, run the FastAPI app; supports local LLMs via LM Studio.

## Links
- Repository: https://github.com/simongonzalezdc/healthadvocate
